changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_log_retention_configured to k8s_audit_log_retention_policy_configured for clarity
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging, which is a key component of security and compliance in K8s environments. The naming convention mostly follows the standards, but a slight adjustment was made to clarify the purpose of the log retention configuration.
naming_improvements: Ensure the function name clearly indicates the configuration of a retention policy
title: Requirement 10.7.3
step1_reasoning: The PCI DSS control 10.7.3 relates to ensuring that logs are retained for a specific period. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs are enabled and that there is a policy in place to retain these logs for a specified duration. This aligns with the cloud checks which focus on log retention policies.
